query:
INSERT INTO learning_path_courses (pathId, courseId, orderIndex)
SELECT 1, c.id, 
  CASE c.title
    WHEN 'Introduction to Theology' THEN 1
    WHEN 'Biblical Hermeneutics' THEN 2
    WHEN 'Christian Ethics' THEN 3
  END
FROM courses c
WHERE c.title IN ('Introduction to Theology', 'Biblical Hermeneutics', 'Christian Ethics')
